SELECT
  DATE(i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN m.name IS NOT NULL THEN m.name
    ELSE 'Без макрорегиона'
  END AS "МР",
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) AS " "
FROM incidents_incident AS i
LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
  AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
  AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
  AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
  AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'     
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 0 AND 5
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 6 AND 15
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 16 AND 30
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END BETWEEN 31 AND 60
    )
    
    OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND 
        CASE 
          WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)) / 60
          ELSE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.incident_date)) / 60
        END > 60
    )
  )
GROUP BY DATE(i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow'), m.name
ORDER BY time ASC;

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    m.name AS macro_region, -- Оставляем, чтобы можно было фильтровать при необходимости
    CASE
      WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.avr_end_date > (i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    AND i.incident_type_id IS NOT NULL
    AND it.sla_deadline IS NOT NULL
    AND i.avr_start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND m.name = 'МР-Москва НБ'
)
SELECT
  sla_status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) as count
FROM
  sla_calc
GROUP BY
  sla_status  -- ОБЯЗАТЕЛЬНО: группируем по статусу, чтобы получить сумму для каждого статуса
ORDER BY
  sla_status;

  waiting_count AS "Менее часа",
  in_progress_count AS "В работе",
  total_count AS "Всего",

  ROUND(
    (SUM(closed_count) OVER (PARTITION BY contractor_name)::NUMERIC / 
     NULLIF(SUM(total_count) OVER (PARTITION BY contractor_name), 0)::NUMERIC) * 100,

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id, -- Обязательно для устранения дублей
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Фиксированный SLA 72 часа (4320 минут)
          WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Проверка на просрочку (текущее время > начало + 72ч)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          -- Менее часа до конца (осталось <= 1 час)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    -- JOIN к типу инцидента УБРАН, так как SLA фиксирован
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )

  ) || ' ч' AS hour_label,
  ROUND(
    (
      COUNT(em.id) :: NUMERIC / SUM(COUNT(em.id)) OVER ()
    ) * 100,
    2
  ) AS percent_of_total
FROM
  incidents_incident AS i
  LEFT JOIN emails_emailmessage AS em ON i.id = em.email_incident_id
  LEFT JOIN emails_emailfolder AS ef ON em.folder_id = ef.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
  LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
  --AND ef.name = 'INBOX'
  AND (
    $dispatch = 0
    OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch)
  )
  AND (
    '${operator_group}' = '0'
    OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}'
  )
  AND (
    '${duration_range}' = '0'
    OR (
      '${duration_range}' = '0-5'
      AND CASE
        WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
        ELSE EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (NOW() - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
      END BETWEEN 0
      AND 5
    )
    OR (
      '${duration_range}' = '5-15'
      AND CASE
        WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
        ELSE EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (NOW() - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
      END BETWEEN 6
      AND 15
    )
    OR (
      '${duration_range}' = '15-30'
      AND CASE
        WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
        ELSE EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (NOW() - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
      END BETWEEN 16
      AND 30
    )
    OR (
      '${duration_range}' = '30-60'
      AND CASE
        WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
        ELSE EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (NOW() - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
      END BETWEEN 31
      AND 60
    )
    OR (
      '${duration_range}' = '>60'
      AND CASE
        WHEN i.incident_finish_date IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (i.incident_finish_date - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
        ELSE EXTRACT(
          EPOCH
          FROM
            (NOW() - i.incident_date)
        ) / 60
      END > 60
    )
  )
GROUP BY
  TO_CHAR(
    i.incident_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow',
    'HH24'
  ) || ' ч'
ORDER BY
  hour_label;

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id, -- Обязательно для устранения дублей
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Фиксированный SLA 72 часа (4320 минут)
          WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Проверка на просрочку (текущее время > начало + 72ч)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          -- Менее часа до конца (осталось <= 1 час)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    -- JOIN к типу инцидента УБРАН, так как SLA фиксирован
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    -- Условие на тип инцидента убрано, но можно добавить фильтр по названию типа, если нужно только РВР
    -- AND it.name = 'РВР' (если бы мы оставили JOIN)
    AND i.rvr_start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND m.name = 'МР-Северо-Запад НБ'
)
SELECT
  sla_status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) as count
FROM
  sla_calc
GROUP BY
  sla_status
ORDER BY
  sla_status;

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    m.name AS macro_region,
    -- Расчет статуса SLA для РВР (72 часа = 4320 минут)
    CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status,
    
    -- Числовой приоритет для сортировки
    CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') 
            THEN 1 
          ELSE 4   
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 1 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 2 
          ELSE 3   
        END
    END as sort_priority
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    -- JOIN к типу инцидента убран, так как SLA фиксирован для РВР
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    -- Фильтр только на начало РВР
    AND i.rvr_start_date IS NOT NULL
),
aggregated_stats AS (
  -- Предварительная агрегация, чтобы корректно посчитать доли
  SELECT
    sla_status,
    sort_priority,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) as total_count
  FROM sla_calc
  GROUP BY sla_status, sort_priority
)
SELECT
  sla_status AS "Статус",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  ROUND(
    (total_count::NUMERIC / SUM(total_count) OVER ()) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS "Доля, %"
FROM
  aggregated_stats
ORDER BY
  sort_priority ASC;

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    m.name AS macro_region,
    -- Расчет статуса SLA для ДГУ (15 дней = 1296000 секунд)
    CASE
      WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
          WHEN i.dgu_end_date > (i.dgu_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          ELSE 'Закрыт за 15 дней'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Для открытых заявок считаем время от старта (NOW - start_date)
          
          -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд) -> Просрочен
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          
          -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'Менее 12 часов'
          
          -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней -> В работе
          ELSE 'Менее 15 дней'
        END
    END as sla_status,
    
    -- Числовой приоритет для сортировки
    CASE
      WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.dgu_end_date > (i.dgu_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 1 -- Более 15 дней (самый важный)
          ELSE 4   -- Закрыт за 15 дней (самый низкий)
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 1 -- Более 15 дней
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 3  -- Менее 12 часов
          ELSE 2   -- Менее 15 дней
        END
    END as sort_priority
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    AND i.dgu_start_date IS NOT NULL
),
aggregated_stats AS (
  -- Предварительная агрегация для корректного расчета долей
  SELECT
    sla_status,
    sort_priority,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) as total_count
  FROM sla_calc
  GROUP BY sla_status, sort_priority
)
SELECT
  sla_status AS "Статус",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  ROUND(
    (total_count::NUMERIC / SUM(total_count) OVER ()) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS "Доля, %"
FROM
  aggregated_stats
ORDER BY
  sort_priority ASC;

WITH sla_data AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    op.operator_group, 
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.rvr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 72 часов с начала
          WHEN i.rvr_end_date > (i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Для открытых заявок считаем время от старта до дедлайна
          
          -- 1. Уже просрочено (текущее время > начало + 72ч)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          
          -- 2. Осталось меньше 1 часа до конца срока (3600 секунд)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.rvr_start_date + INTERVAL '4320 minutes') - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          
          -- 3. Осталось больше 1 часа, но меньше 72 часов
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status_key
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    -- JOIN к типу инцидента убран, так как SLA фиксирован для РВР
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    -- Фильтры только на начало РВР и валидность данных
    AND i.rvr_start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND op.operator_group IS NOT NULL
),
regional_stats AS (
  SELECT
    operator_group,
    macro_region,
    -- Считаем уникальные ID для каждого статуса
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Просрочен') AS expired_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Закрыто вовремя') AS closed_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Менее часа') AS waiting_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'В работе') AS in_progress_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_count
  FROM sla_data
  GROUP BY operator_group, macro_region
)
SELECT
  operator_group AS "Группа оператора",
  macro_region AS "Макрорегион",
  
  -- Детальные цифры
  expired_count AS "Просрочено",
  closed_count AS "Закрыто вовремя",
  waiting_count AS "Менее часа",
  in_progress_count AS "В работе",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  
  -- Процент выполнения SLA (Закрыто вовремя / Всего) * 100
  ROUND(
    (SUM(closed_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group)::NUMERIC / 
     NULLIF(SUM(total_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group), 0)::NUMERIC) * 100, 
    1
  ) AS "SLA, %"
FROM
  regional_stats
ORDER BY
  "SLA, %" ASC, 
  "Группа оператора" ASC;

WITH sla_data AS (
  SELECT
    i.id,
    op.operator_group, 
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.dgu_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
          WHEN i.dgu_end_date > (i.dgu_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          ELSE 'Закрыт за 15 дней'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Для открытых заявок считаем время от старта (NOW - start_date)
          
          -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд) -> Просрочен
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          
          -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.dgu_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'Менее 12 часов'
          
          -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней -> В работе
          ELSE 'Менее 15 дней'
        END
    END as sla_status_key
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    -- Фильтры только на начало ДГУ и валидность данных
    AND i.dgu_start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND op.operator_group IS NOT NULL
),
regional_stats AS (
  SELECT
    operator_group,
    macro_region,
    -- Считаем уникальные ID для каждого статуса
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Более 15 дней') AS expired_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Закрыт за 15 дней') AS closed_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Менее 12 часов') AS waiting_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Менее 15 дней') AS in_progress_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_count
  FROM sla_data
  GROUP BY operator_group, macro_region
)
SELECT
  operator_group AS "Группа оператора",
  macro_region AS "Макрорегион",
  
  -- Детальные цифры
  expired_count AS "Более 15 дней",
  closed_count AS "Закрыт за 15 дней",
  waiting_count AS "Менее 12 ч",
  in_progress_count AS "Менее 15 дней",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  
  -- Процент выполнения SLA (Закрыто вовремя / Всего) * 100
  ROUND(
    (SUM(closed_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group)::NUMERIC / 
     NULLIF(SUM(total_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group), 0)::NUMERIC) * 100, 
    1
  ) AS "SLA, %"
FROM

spec.title: Ежедневная сводка активности по инцидентам
spec.description: Данные об истории закрытых инцидентов сохраняются в течение последних 365 дней.

spec.rawSql:
WITH all_activities AS (
    -- 1. Изменения инцидентов (Changelog)
    SELECT
        ic.created_at AS event_time,
        ic.changed_by_id AS user_id,
        i.id AS incident_id
    FROM incidents_incidentchangelog ic
    JOIN incidents_incident i ON ic.incident_id = i.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
    WHERE
        $__timeFilter(ic.created_at)
         AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
         AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
         AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
         AND ($dispatch = 0 OR ic.changed_by_id IN ($dispatch))
         AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
         AND (
             '${duration_range}' = '0'
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60
             )
         )

    UNION ALL

    -- 2. Комментарии
    SELECT
        c.created_at AS event_time,
        c.author_id AS user_id,
        c.incident_id
    FROM incidents_comment c
    JOIN incidents_incident i ON c.incident_id = i.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
    WHERE
        $__timeFilter(c.created_at)
         AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
         AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
         AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
         AND ($dispatch = 0 OR c.author_id IN ($dispatch))
         AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
         AND (
             '${duration_range}' = '0'
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60
             )
         )

    UNION ALL

    -- 3. История инцидентов
    SELECT
        ih.insert_date AS event_time,
        ih.performed_by_id AS user_id,
        ih.incident_id
    FROM incidents_incidenthistory ih
    JOIN incidents_incident i ON ih.incident_id = i.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
    WHERE
        $__timeFilter(ih.insert_date)
        AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
        AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
        AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
        AND ($dispatch = 0 OR ih.performed_by_id IN ($dispatch))
        AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
        AND (
             '${duration_range}' = '0'
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60
             )
             OR (
                 '${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60
             )
         )
)
SELECT
    -- ИСПРАВЛЕНИЕ: Название колонки должно быть "time" (строчными буквами) без кавычек
    --date_trunc('hour', event_time) AS time, 
    DATE(event_time AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow') AS time,
    COALESCE(
        CASE 
            WHEN u.id IS NOT NULL THEN 
                COALESCE(NULLIF(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, ' '), 'Диспетчер') || ' [ID: ' || u.id::text || ']'
            ELSE NULL

        'Отсутствует'

    COUNT(*) AS " "

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    m.name AS macro_region,
    -- Расчет статуса SLA для ДГУ (15 дней = 1296000 секунд)
    CASE
      WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
          WHEN i.eks_end_date > (i.eks_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          ELSE 'Закрыт за 15 дней'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Для открытых заявок считаем время от старта (NOW - start_date)
          
          -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд) -> Просрочен
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          
          -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'Менее 12 часов'
          
          -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней -> В работе
          ELSE 'Менее 15 дней'
        END
    END as sla_status,
    
    -- Числовой приоритет для сортировки
    CASE
      WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.eks_end_date > (i.eks_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 1 -- Более 15 дней (самый важный)
          ELSE 4   -- Закрыт за 15 дней (самый низкий)
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 1 -- Более 15 дней
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 3  -- Менее 12 часов
          ELSE 2   -- Менее 15 дней
        END
    END as sort_priority
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    AND i.eks_start_date IS NOT NULL
),
aggregated_stats AS (
  -- Предварительная агрегация для корректного расчета долей
  SELECT
    sla_status,
    sort_priority,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) as total_count
  FROM sla_calc
  GROUP BY sla_status, sort_priority
)
SELECT
  sla_status AS "Статус",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  ROUND(
    (total_count::NUMERIC / SUM(total_count) OVER ()) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS "Доля, %"
FROM
  aggregated_stats
ORDER BY
  sort_priority ASC;

WITH sla_data AS (
  SELECT
    i.id,
    op.operator_group, 
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.eks_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          -- Если закрыто, но прошло больше 15 дней с начала
          WHEN i.eks_end_date > (i.eks_start_date + INTERVAL '15 days') 
            THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          ELSE 'Закрыт за 15 дней'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          -- Для открытых заявок считаем время от старта (NOW - start_date)
          
          -- 1. Прошло больше 15 дней (15 * 24 * 3600 = 1296000 секунд) -> Просрочен
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) > 1296000 THEN 'Более 15 дней'
          
          -- 2. Прошло меньше 12 часов с момента старта (12 * 3600 = 43200 секунд)
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.eks_start_date)) <= 43200 THEN 'Менее 12 часов'
          
          -- 3. Прошло больше 12 часов, но меньше 15 дней -> В работе
          ELSE 'Менее 15 дней'
        END
    END as sla_status_key
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    -- Фильтры только на начало ДГУ и валидность данных
    AND i.eks_start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND op.operator_group IS NOT NULL
),
regional_stats AS (
  SELECT
    operator_group,
    macro_region,
    -- Считаем уникальные ID для каждого статуса
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Более 15 дней') AS expired_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Закрыт за 15 дней') AS closed_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Менее 12 часов') AS waiting_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) FILTER (WHERE sla_status_key = 'Менее 15 дней') AS in_progress_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS total_count
  FROM sla_data
  GROUP BY operator_group, macro_region
)
SELECT
  operator_group AS "Группа оператора",
  macro_region AS "Макрорегион",
  
  -- Детальные цифры
  expired_count AS "Более 15 дней",
  closed_count AS "Закрыт за 15 дней",
  waiting_count AS "Менее 12 ч",
  in_progress_count AS "Менее 15 дней",
  total_count AS "Всего",
  
  -- Процент выполнения SLA (Закрыто вовремя / Всего) * 100
  ROUND(
    (SUM(closed_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group)::NUMERIC / 
     NULLIF(SUM(total_count) OVER (PARTITION BY operator_group), 0)::NUMERIC) * 100, 
    1
  ) AS "SLA, %"
FROM
  regional_stats

WITH sla_calc AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    i.id,
    m.name AS macro_region,
    CASE
      WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.avr_end_date > (i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) 
            THEN 'Просрочен'
          ELSE 'Закрыто вовремя'
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) < 0 THEN 'Просрочен'
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 'Менее часа'
          ELSE 'В работе'
        END
    END as sla_status,
    -- Добавляем числовой приоритет для сортировки
    CASE
      WHEN i.avr_end_date IS NOT NULL THEN
        CASE 
          WHEN i.avr_end_date > (i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) 
            THEN 1 -- Просрочен (самый важный)
          ELSE 4   -- Закрыто вовремя (самый низкий приоритет)
        END
      ELSE
        CASE 
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) < 0 THEN 1 -- Просрочен
          WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((i.avr_start_date + (it.sla_deadline || ' minutes') :: interval) - NOW())) <= 3600 THEN 2 -- Менее часа
          ELSE 3   -- В работе
        END
    END as sort_priority
  FROM
    incidents_incident AS i
    JOIN incidents_incidenttype AS it ON i.incident_type_id = it.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_pole AS p ON i.pole_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_region AS r ON p.region_id = r.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_macroregion AS m ON r.macroregion_id = m.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation AS b ON i.base_station_id = b.id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestation_operator AS bs_op ON b.id = bs_op.basestation_id
    LEFT JOIN ts_basestationoperator AS op ON bs_op.basestationoperator_id = op.id
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(i.incident_date)
    AND ($macroregion = 0 OR m.id IN ($macroregion))
    AND ($avr_contractor = 0 OR p.avr_contractor_id IN ($avr_contractor))
    AND ('${region_manager}' = '0' OR r.responsible_manager = '${region_manager}')
    AND ($dispatch = 0 OR i.responsible_user_id IN ($dispatch))
    AND ('${operator_group}' = '0' OR op.operator_group = '${operator_group}')
    AND (
        '${duration_range}' = '0'     
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '0-5' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 0 AND 5)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '5-15' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 6 AND 15)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '15-30' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 16 AND 30)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '30-60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 BETWEEN 31 AND 60)
        OR ('${duration_range}' = '>60' AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(i.incident_finish_date, NOW()) - i.incident_date)) / 60 > 60)
    )
    AND i.incident_type_id IS NOT NULL
    AND it.sla_deadline IS NOT NULL
    AND i.avr_start_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  sla_status AS "Статус",
  COUNT(DISTINCT id) as "Всего",
  ROUND(
    (COUNT(DISTINCT id)::NUMERIC / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER ()) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS "Доля, %"
FROM
  sla_calc
GROUP BY
  sla_status, sort_priority -- Группируем по статусу и приоритету, чтобы не потерять порядок
ORDER BY
  sort_priority ASC; -- Сортируем по возрастанию приоритета (1 -> 4)

spec.name: dispatch
spec.label: Ответственный

spec.query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    CASE 
      WHEN first_name IS NOT NULL AND last_name IS NOT NULL THEN first_name || ' ' || last_name
      ELSE 'Диспетчер'
    END, 
    'Диспетчер'
  ) || ' [ID: ' || id::text || ']' AS "User Name",
  id AS "User ID"
FROM users_user
WHERE 
  role = 'dispatch'
  AND is_active = true
ORDER BY 
  first_name ASC, 
  last_name ASC, 
  id ASC;
